scripts.build:c: tree-sitter generate && cd typedown-yaml && tree-sitter generate && cd ../typedown-md && tree-sitter generate && cd ../typedown-md-inline && tree-sitter generate
scripts.build:wasm: pnpm run build:c && tree-sitter build --wasm grammar.js && tree-sitter build --wasm typedown-yaml/grammar.js && tree-sitter build --wasm typedown-md/grammar.js && tree-sitter build --wasm typedown-md-inline/grammar.js
